name: Chicken Mushroom Pasta Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 3 lb fryer chicken, whole or cut up
1/2 cup heavy cream or half and half
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken in a Crock-Pot with celery, onions, and salt.
2. Combine chicken broth (or water) with tomato paste in a bowl.
3. Pour the sauce mixture over the ingredients in the Crock-Pot.
4. Add sherry, oregano, and mushrooms; stir to moisten all ingredients.
5. Cover and cook on Low for 8-10 hours or on High for 3 1/2-5 hours.
6. Remove chicken from the Crock-Pot; discard bones and dice the meat.
7. Return diced chicken back to the Crock-Pot.
8. Knead butter and flour together in a bowl, then add with cream.
9. Stir well and cover.
10. Cook on High for 30 minutes to 1 1/2 hours or on Low for 3-5 hours.
Serves 4 to 6
